SEARCH
Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.metadata

Class EphemeralMetadataRegistry<T extends @NotNull Object>

java.lang.Object
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.metadata.EphemeralMetadataRegistry<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of metadata associated with objects; must be a non-null object
All Implemented Interfaces:
MetadataRegistry<T>
public class EphemeralMetadataRegistry<T extends @NotNull Object> extends Object implements MetadataRegistry<T>
A thread-safe implementation of the MetadataRegistry interface that provides temporary storage for metadata associated with objects. Metadata is stored in a weak reference map, allowing objects to be garbage collected when no longer referenced.

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • EphemeralMetadataRegistry

      public EphemeralMetadataRegistry()
      Constructs an instance of EphemeralMetadataRegistry. This registry provides temporary, thread-safe storage for metadata associated with objects. Metadata is stored in a weak reference map, ensuring that target objects can be garbage collected when they are no longer strongly referenced elsewhere.

  • Method Details

    • bind

      public void bind(Object target, T metadata)
      Associates the specified metadata with the given target object in a thread-safe manner. If the target already has existing metadata bound, it will be replaced with the new metadata.
      Specified by:
      bind in interface MetadataRegistry<T extends @NotNull Object>
      Parameters:
      target - the object to which the metadata is to be bound; must not be null
      metadata - the metadata to associate with the given target; must not be null

    • get

      public @Nullable T get(Object target)
      Retrieves the metadata associated with the specified target object in a thread-safe manner.
      Specified by:
      get in interface MetadataRegistry<T extends @NotNull Object>
      Parameters:
      target - the object for which metadata is to be retrieved; must not be null
      Returns:
      the metadata associated with the specified target, or null if no metadata is associated

    • stream

      public Stream<T> stream(Object target)
      Streams the metadata associated with the specified target object, if any. The stream will contain at most one element, which is the metadata associated with the target, or be empty if no metadata is associated with the target.
      Specified by:
      stream in interface MetadataRegistry<T extends @NotNull Object>
      Parameters:
      target - the object for which to stream the associated metadata; must not be null
      Returns:
      a stream containing the metadata associated with the specified target, or an empty stream if no metadata is associated with the target

    • unbind

      public @Nullable T unbind(Object target)
      Unbinds and removes the metadata associated with the given target object, if any exists. If no metadata is associated with the target, this method returns null.
      Specified by:
      unbind in interface MetadataRegistry<T extends @NotNull Object>
      Parameters:
      target - the object whose associated metadata is to be removed; must not be null
      Returns:
      the metadata that was previously associated with the specified target, or null if no metadata was associated
